title: pi-built gallery page
body: Create ~/aos/pi-built/gallery.html — same deep-space visual language as index.html — listing everything built on this Pi so far (index.html + this page) with dates and one-line descriptions. Link back to index.html. It will be served by the existing server on :43781. Work ONLY inside ~/aos/pi-built/. No git, no sudo, no network.
